claim_boundary: Tier 4.32d-r0 is a local route/source/package audit only. It is not a SpiNNaker hardware run, not an EBRAINS package, not multi-chip execution evidence, not speedup evidence, not learning-scale evidence, not benchmark superiority, and not a native-scale baseline freeze.

criteria.name: MCPL send path delegates delivery to router table
MCPL init installs local core routes
explicit inter-chip link route is absent and classified
hardware package remains blocked by source audit

failure_classes.detection_rule: cra_state_mcpl_init has only MC_CORE_ROUTE(core_id) delivery and no explicit link route or placement-provided routing table contract
failure_classes.required_response: do not prepare EBRAINS package; implement or prove inter-chip route entries first

failure_classes.detection_rule: attempted true two-partition cross-chip learning with only one shard_id field
failure_classes.required_response: add origin/target shard semantics before multi-partition learning

failure_classes.detection_rule: upload folder or command claims learning scale, speedup, or two-partition learning before route smoke passes
failure_classes.required_response: delete/rewrite package and preserve audit failure

source_findings.interpretation: MCPL packet construction is present for the split-role smoke.
source_findings.observed: cra_state_mcpl_lookup_send_request_shard and cra_state_mcpl_lookup_send_reply_shard emit MCPL packets with shard-aware keys

source_findings.decision: 4.32d must verify router entries, not just command arguments
source_findings.interpretation: The send path intentionally ignores dest_core; routing table entries are the delivery authority.

source_findings.decision: block package until inter-chip route repair or explicit placement/routing contract exists
source_findings.interpretation: cra_state_mcpl_init currently routes matched request/reply keys to the local core only and does not name inter-chip links.
The 4.32c boundary remains correct: split-role single-shard smoke is the first honest target; true two-partition learning needs origin/target shard semantics later.
source_findings.observed: one shard_id field in MCPL key

summary.recommended_next_step: Tier 4.32d-r1 inter-chip MCPL route repair/local QA before any EBRAINS package.
